label: Cyrenth Bastion-City
description: Cyrenth Bastion-City stands as the principal fortified enclave of Cyrenth Vale, built in stepped curtain-walls of ferrocrete and void-black adamantine that follow the rift-scarred escarpments. Its avenues run beneath armored arcades and sealed overpasses, forming a continuous internal circulation network designed for siege endurance and contamination control. High spire-beacons and auspex masts punctuate the skyline, their warning lamps casting hard color through the planet’s bruise-hued aurorae. Gate complexes, ration plazas, and munitorum courts dominate the civic core, reflecting an urban form governed by quarantine protocol and defense logistics.
